theme: firing a dragon-kiln for one perfect glaze
title: Dragon-Kiln Firing Plan: Exact Glaze Rendezvous
strategies: full-window nearest-burner blast, deduplicated (trivial, the checker's own baseline)

true minimal-fuel firing plan (open ceiling: exact joint timing/power co-optimization across overlapping kernels, uncovered)
